observe_decisions.object_type_reasoning: The image contains cellular textures typical of kidney cortex histology, where individual cells and their boundaries are prominent features.
observe_decisions.color_mode_reasoning: The image is inherently grayscale, and color does not carry diagnostic information in this context, as it is a single-channel image.
observe_decisions.filtration_reasoning: Sublevel filtration is appropriate for capturing dark-on-light structures, such as stained cells and tissue boundaries commonly found in histological images.

ph_signals.name: sparse_distinctive
ph_signals.description: Few but persistent features — compact representations preferred
ph_signals.reasoning: Sparse PH diagrams with high average persistence contain few but meaningful features. Tropical coordinates or persistence images can preserve the geometric structure of these sparse diagrams better than statistical summaries.
